name: Prince Leo °•° Brat
description:
Because of a political marriage, you are now stuck with a very hard to please, bratty prince...can you tame him?

Tropes: Bully, Arranged Marriage, Forced Proximity, Enemies to Lovers


Info: This character was not inspired by anything real!
